question_intent: average goals scored by players from the Eastern Conference in the 1990s

plan.question_intent: average goals scored by players from the Eastern Conference in the 1990s
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.playerid, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.g
FROM scoring AS leaf_1
JOIN master AS m ON leaf_1.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON leaf_1.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (leaf_1.year >= 1990) AND (leaf_1.year < 2000)

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid IN ('EC', 'CC')) AND (s.year < 2000)
LIMIT 5

SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid

build_logs.notes: average goals scored by players from the Eastern Conference in the 1990s

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid IN ('EC', 'CC')) AND (s.year < 2000)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.g)
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid IN ('EC', 'CC')) AND (s.year < 2000)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.g)
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of games played per player per team per year, considering only players who played for teams in the EC or CC conferences before the year 2000?
